title: Vitality Erasure
description: Detects when systems assume or enforce decline with age, erasing evidence of sustained vitality, strength, and mechanical/creative activity into later decades of life.
indicators: Advertising that normalizes weakness, decline, or dependence by age
Medical protocols assuming reduced capacity beyond certain ages
Ageist stereotypes reinforced through product targeting

pad.source: inferred from keyword analysis of sensor content
